subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Most Compassionate Lord, that which hath flowed from the pen of that spiritual companion hath been observed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه حضرت رحمانیت آنچه از قلم آن همدم روحانی جاری ملاحظه گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
